text:
nefic lords are :—
(1) First house lord, other than the Moon; (2) the 5th and
9th lords (Thrikonadhipathis); (3) and (4) lords of the 4th,
7th and 10th when they do not happen to be natural
benefics.
The lord of the 9th is decidedly more benefic than the
lord of the 5th. Similarly lord of the 10th is more benefic
than that of the 7th while the lord of the 4th is the least
benefic.
The malefics or malefic lords in a horoscope are :—
(1) Lords of the 3rd, 6th and 11th houses; (2) lords of the
4th, 7th and 10th houses (Kendradhipathis) if they happen
to be natural benefics. Again among the malefics the 11th
lord is the worst malefic, the 6th less malefic while the 3rd
the least malefic.

Considerations in Judging a House 9
The neutrals in a horoscope are:—(1) The Moon—when
he is lord of Lagna, (2) the Sun or the Moon as the 8th lord,
(3) the Sun or the Moon as the lords of the 2nd and 12th.
Thus the student has to be very careful in correctly
